calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Clerks Judgment Pursuant To Ccp Section 473b; Points And Authorities; And Declaration
Off Calendar Nov-26-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Evan Adams, Esq. 415-703-4824 of Dept. Of Industrial Relations for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT'S Motion To Vacate Clerks Judgment Pursuant To Ccp Section 473b.

Division's motion to vacate judgment is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
